On this page

DYO Project Documentation ​

Technical documentation for the DYO (Design Your Own) interactive 3D headstone designer at forevershining.org.

Documentation Index ​

DocumentDescription
Architecture OverviewHigh-level system architecture, tech stack, and design principles
App Router & RoutesNext.js App Router structure, pages, layouts, and API endpoints
3D Scene SystemThree.js/R3F scene graph, lighting, environment, and rendering pipeline
Components ReferenceReact component inventory with hierarchy and data flow
State ManagementZustand store slices, actions, selectors, and pricing logic
Database SchemaPostgreSQL/Drizzle ORM tables, relationships, and migrations
ConfigurationBuild tools, environment variables, CI/CD, and deployment
Scripts & ToolingUtility scripts for asset conversion, seeding, and batch operations

API Reference ​

DocumentDescription
Store APIAll ~50+ Zustand store actions with signatures, parameters, and side effects
Utility FunctionsExported functions from 21+ lib utility files
Three.js Components13 R3F component internals: props, functions, store subscriptions
Auth, DB & API RoutesAuth session, DB schema, catalog-db, projects-db, API handlers
Hooks & ConstantsCustom hooks, constants, secondary stores, data mappings

Quick Start ​

bash
pnpm install          # Install dependencies
pnpm dev              # Start dev server (Turbopack)
pnpm build            # Production build (primary validation gate)
pnpm validate         # type-check + lint + format:check

Tech Stack Summary ​

LayerTechnology
FrameworkNext.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript 5.9
3D RenderingThree.js 0.180 + React Three Fiber 9 + Drei 10
StateZustand 5
StylingTailwind CSS 4, Flowbite
DatabasePostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
AuthJWT (jose) + bcryptjs
ValidationZod 4
Package Managerpnpm (≥8)
Pager
Next pageArchitecture

DYO — Design Your Own Headstone
